What We Do
Comprehensive Engineering Services
Eight specialist divisions under one roof — from design through to commissioning and long-term maintenance.

Solar & Power Systems

Complete solar and backup power solutions for commercial, industrial, and residential clients.

Hybrid solar system design & installation
Inverter & lithium battery solutions
Generator installation & maintenance
Power audits & energy management
UPS & backup power systems

Access control systems
Biometric attendance systems

Remote monitoring & integration

PLC programming & commissioning
SCADA systems design

Forecourt automation systems

Why OTH Ltd
Built for Complex Engineering Challenges
01

Multi-discipline expertise

Electrical, automation, security, and civil disciplines integrated — one company, no handover gaps between trades.

02

24/7 emergency response

Dedicated emergency call-out teams for critical infrastructure failures, available around the clock with a 4-hour on-site SLA.

03

End-to-end project delivery

From feasibility study to commissioning and long-term maintenance contracts — we manage the full asset lifecycle.

04

Industry-grade standards

All designs conform to IEE, ISO, and SON standards. Full documentation, test certificates, and compliance reports included.

05

Proven track record

500+ projects across commercial, industrial, and residential sectors throughout Nigeria and West Africa over 12 years.

Protect your assets with a structured SLA-backed maintenance plan. Monthly, quarterly, and annual packages with dedicated technician assignment.

Our Team
Meet Our Lead Engineers
Our certified engineers bring decades of combined experience across every discipline — ready to take on your toughest projects.
Engr. Bilal
Automation & Instrumentation Engineer

9+ years engineering PLC and SCADA systems for oil & gas, manufacturing, and water treatment facilities across Nigeria. Certified Siemens TIA Portal programmer and industrial IoT integrator. Managed projects worth ₦500M+.

Siemens S7 · Allen-Bradley · SCADA · HMI · Industrial IoT · Process Control
📞 08039790207 💬 WhatsApp ✉️ Email
Engr. Adewale
Senior Pump & Petroleum Systems Engineer

11+ years specialising in petroleum infrastructure across Abuja and Lagos. Expert in fuel dispenser installation, ATG tank monitoring (Veeder-Root, Franklin), and forecourt automation. DPR certified with full compliance documentation capability.

ATG Systems · Veeder-Root · Gilbarco · Wayne · Forecourt Automation · DPR
📞 08074591971 💬 WhatsApp ✉️ Email
Engr. Kehinde
Solar & Renewable Energy Expert

8+ years designing hybrid solar PV systems, lithium battery storage, and off-grid inverter solutions for residential, commercial and industrial clients. PVsyst certified designer with expertise in load analysis, string sizing, and monitoring integration.

PVsyst · Hybrid Solar · MPPT · Inverters · Lithium Batteries · Load Balancing
📞 08039790207 💬 WhatsApp ✉️ Email

We're always looking for talented engineers and technicians to grow with us across Abuja and Lagos.
